description: A customer who requested a port-in has changed their mind and wants to cancel it before it completes.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their pending port-in request.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the active port-in request.

nodes.task_description: Submit a cancellation request for the pending port.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uses the tool to cancel the port.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that the port has been cancelled and their number will remain with their old carrier.
